creator: cherry@trombik.org
text:
On Thu, Aug 14, 2008 at 11:20:51AM -0400, Wesley Shields wrote:
> 
> Any conclusion on who is going to be the maintainer since Paul indicates
> it should be one of you two (and he is also willing to hand over
> maintainer role of security/bro).  Anyone willing to step up and
> maintain these ports?

I'd like to see the mentioned bro-devel written in the past. But yes,
I'll take care of them, anyway.

Best regards,
-- 
Tomoyuki Sakurai
